name: Solitary
publisher: Humza Shakoor, TheGoodMen GamingStudio LLC, Sidronio Tello
short_description: You wake up in a silent white room with no exit—just a voice that follows you through five strange spaces, growing more unsettling as the world twists around you.
detailed_description:
Solitary

You wake up in a silent, white room.
No clues. No instructions. No color.
Only a chair, a bed, a table — and a voice that doesn’t seem too concerned with your confusion.

Solitary is a short first-person psychological experience about isolation, routine, and the slow unraveling of reality. Designed with minimal UI and ambient storytelling, the game leads you through a series of surreal spaces — each one stranger and more detached than the last.

You won’t be told what to do.
But you’ll want to keep moving.

🔍 Features:

  • A series of abstract, atmospheric rooms:

    • A padded white space that slowly populates with sterile furniture

    • A temple-like chamber of cold light and pillars

    • Glowing platforms suspended in a dark, endless void

    • A maze with hidden rules and invisible truths

    • And something waiting at the end... or maybe the beginning

  • A dynamic narrator who evolves with your choices — playful, observant, and maybe just a little too involved

  • A quiet descent into something you were never meant to understand
